text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاکَ‌ بِالْحَقِ‌ بَشِيراً وَ نَذِيراً وَ لاَ تُسْأَلُ‌ عَنْ‌ أَصْحَابِ‌ الْجَحِيمِ‌

en.ahmedali: And We have sent you with the truth to give glad tidings and to warn. You will not be questioned about those and who are inmates of Hell.
en.ahmedraza: Undoubtedly, We have sent you (O dear Prophet Mohammed – peace and blessings be upon him) with the truth, giving glad tidings and conveying warning, and you will not be questioned about the people of hell.
en.arberry: We have sent thee with the truth, good tidings to bear, and warning. Thou shalt not be questioned touching the inhabitants of Hell.
en.daryabadi: Verily We have sent thee with the truth, as a bearer of glad tidings and a warner, and thou shalt not be questioned of the fellows of the Flame.
en.hilali: Verily, We have sent you (O Muhammad Peace be upon him) with the truth (Islam), a bringer of glad tidings (for those who believe in what you brought, that they will enter Paradise) and a warner (for those who disbelieve in what you brought, they will enter the Hell-fire). And you will not be asked about the dwellers of the blazing Fire.
en.itani: We have sent you with the truth—bringing good news, and giving warnings. You will not be questioned about the inmates of Hell.
en.maududi: (what greater Sign could there be than that) We have sent you with the knowledge of the Truth and made you a bearer of good tidings and a Warner? Now, you are not responsible and answerable for those who are bent upon going to Hell.
en.mubarakpuri: Verily, We have sent you (O Muhammad) with the truth (Islam), a bringer of glad tidings (for those who believe in what you brought, that they will enter Paradise) and a warner (for those who disbelieve in what you brought, that they will enter the Hellfire). And you will not be asked about the dwellers of the blazing Fire.
en.pickthall: Lo! We have sent thee (O Muhammad) with the truth, a bringer of glad tidings and a warner. And thou wilt not be asked about the owners of hell-fire.
en.qarai: Indeed We have sent you with the truth, as a bearer of good news and as a warner, and you will not be questioned concerning the inmates of hell.
en.qaribullah: We have sent you (Prophet Muhammad) forth with the truth, a giver of glad tidings and a giver of warning. You shall not be questioned about the companions of Hell.
en.sahih: Indeed, We have sent you, [O Muhammad], with the truth as a bringer of good tidings and a warner, and you will not be asked about the companions of Hellfire.
en.sarwar: We have sent you (Muhammad) for a genuine purpose to proclaim glad news and warnings. You will not be blamed for the dwellers of blazing hell.
en.shakir: Surely We have sent you with the truth as a bearer of good news and as a warner, and you shall not be called upon to answer for the companions of the flaming fire.
en.transliteration: Inna arsalnaka bialhaqqi basheeran wanatheeran wala tusalu Aaan ashabi aljaheemi
en.wahiduddin: We have sent you with the truth, bearing good news and giving warning. You will not be held accountable for the people of the Fire.
en.yusufali: Verily We have sent thee in truth as a bearer of glad tidings and a warner: But of thee no question shall be asked of the Companions of the Blazing Fire.
fa.ansarian: قطعاً ما تو را به درستی و راستی، بشارت دهنده وبیم رسان فرستادیم، و تو [بعد از ابلاغ پیام حق] مسؤولِ [ایمان نیاوردن و وضع و حال] دوزخیان نیستی.
fa.ayati: ما تو را كه سزاوار هستى، به رسالت فرستاديم، تا مژده دهى و بيم دهى. تو مسئول دوزخيان نيستى.
fa.bahrampour: ما تو را به حق فرستاديم تا بشارت دهنده و ترساننده باشى و تو مسئول [گمراهى‌] دوزخيان نيستى
fa.fooladvand: ما تو را بحق فرستاديم، تا بشارتگر و بيم‌دهنده باشى، و [لى‌] درباره دوزخيان، از تو پرسشى نخواهد شد.
fa.ghomshei: (ای پیغمبر) ما تو را به حق فرستادیم که مردم را (به نعمت بهشت) مژده دهی و (از عذاب جهنم) بترسانی، و تو مسئول کافران که به راه جهنم رفتند نیستی.
fa.khorramdel: ما تو را همراه با حقائق یقینی فرستادیم تا مژده‌رسان (مؤمنان) و بیم‌دهنده (ی کافران) باشی. و از تو درباره‌ی (عدم ایمان) دوزخیان پرسیده نمی‌شود (بلکه بر رسولان پیام باشد و بس). [[«بِالْحَقِّ»: همراه با حق. مؤیّد با حق. مراد از (حق) قرآن یا اسلام است (نگا: نساء / 170، بقره / 190). «بَشِیراً»: مژده‌رسان. «نَذِیراً»: ترساننده. بیم‌دهنده. «الْجَحیمِ»: آتش برافروخته و فروزان. اسمی از اسماء دوزخ است.]]
fa.khorramshahi: ما تو را به حق مژده‌بخش و هشداردهنده فرستاده‌ایم و با تو درباره دوزخیان چون و چرا نکنند
fa.makarem: ما تو را به حق، برای بشارت و بیم دادن (مردم جهان) فرستادیم؛ و تو مسئول (گمراهی) دوزخیان (پس از ابلاغ رسالت) نیستی!
fa.moezzi: همانا فرستادیمت به حقّ بشارت‌دهنده و ترساننده و پرسیده نمی‌شوی تو از دوزخیان‌
fa.mojtabavi: ما تو را براستى نويدرسان و بيم‌دهنده فرستاديم، و تو را از دوزخيان نپرسند.
fa.sadeqi: ما همواره تو را به تمامی حق فرستادیم، حال آنکه بشارتگر و هشداردهنده‌‌ای، و درباره‌ی دوزخیان تو مسئول نیستی.
